headline: A Look At Synchrony Financial’s Valuation As CareCredit Expands On Walmartcom And New Initiatives Roll Out
summary: Why Synchrony’s latest CareCredit expansion matters for investors Synchrony Financial (SYF) is drawing fresh attention after expanding CareCredit acceptance to eligible health and wellness purchases on Walmart.com, alongside new financial literacy initiatives and rising analyst optimism ahead of upcoming first quarter results.
